evidence: "It's a story of an ordinary older woman who decides go into the 'detective' business and does very well."
"Great book, well done as a movie"
"Not for everyone, I guess, as there's not a lot of 'action'."
"This is true of this movie. It is hardly true to the short story but is still a delightful movie."
"Not for everyone, I guess, as there's not a lot of 'action'."
"It is hardly true to the short story but is still a delightful movie."
"Acting, production values, music were all great."
"Good quality for a very old movie!"
"All talking Rowan Atkinson at his best (don't look for Mr. Bean!)."
"This movie struck a chord with me as I, but for my mum taking me from London to Edinburgh, I might have been one of those kids!"
"Each Christmas, the Choir invites other 'world class' performers, such as Bryn Terfel... Just fantastic talents performing great Christmas music!"
"This movie struck a chord with me as I, but for my mum taking me from London to Edinburgh, I might have been one of those kids!"
"Delightful movie. We both enjoyed it very much."

summary: The user enjoys drama and family-oriented films with a strong emphasis on quality production values. They prefer slower-paced narratives that evoke emotional resonance, often appreciating adaptations of books. Overall, their taste leans towards heartfelt stories with rich character development.
